body.title: Neuroscience → self-model engrams: after reading AI/ML+neuro books, seed engrams that help Igor model his own cognition on the biology
body.result: Closed per Akien 2026-05-01: empty desc/notes/body — too vague to act on. Title concept (neuro→self-model engrams) survives in spirit through other cognition tickets (T-anticipation-primitive, T-planning-as-waypoint-graph, T-goal-formation-from-conversation).
